claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: native action buttons by default; labelled listbox with options only for selection mode
semantics.rolePolicy: Interaction semantics change together with keyboard and selection behavior.

keyboard.behavior: Moves roving focus only in selection mode.
Moves to first or last enabled option only in selection mode.
Activates or selects the focused suggestion.

nonColor: aria-selected, focus position and visible text accompany selected styling.
responsive: Actions wrap on wide surfaces and stack to full width on narrow surfaces.
consumerResponsibilities: Choose action semantics unless persistent selection is genuinely intended.
Provide localized textValue, labels and descriptions.
Own prompt submission, model calls and persistence.
Avoid suggestions that imply unsafe or irreversible execution without confirmation.
